name: ws-bridge-jobs-logs
title: Phase D: WebSocket bridge (jobs/logs)
description: Add minimal WebSocket bridge to stream job state and logs/events to the Vue workspace; keep HTTP endpoints + polling as fallback.
creator: zquant
notes: Round 3 review failed. Current implementation still mishandles frontend connection lifecycle: manual disconnect triggers reconnect, and JobsTab cleanup is registered incorrectly inside onMounted, so unsubscribe/disconnect may never run. Repairs tracked in prd.md.
